name: Media Word Filter
description: Media Word Filter companion for Jellyfin. Dashboard config, mute/profile proxy, and reliable jellyfin-web client inject via middleware + File Transformation.
overview: Details-page profile/filter UI, mute loop, and /MediaWordFilter proxy. Injects client script at request time (IStartupFilter) with File Transformation as backup.
changelog: Fix FT payload extraction and HTML detection, add IStartupFilter middleware inject, improve mute auth/HLS playback.
